title: Fill-rate collapse during session
summary: Broker fills began to diverge from model fills at 15:30 UTC. Investigation suggests a timeout configuration regression. Engaged kill switch after 4 consecutive divergences.
actions_taken: Engaged kill switch at 15:34 UTC via qlrk
Exported current manifest and compared to clean baseline
Rolled back feature_flag regression in next deploy
followups: Tighten monitoring threshold for fill_rate_warn from 0.7 to 0.8
Add reconciliation_match_rate to the daily review

triggered.name: fill_rate_halt
triggered.message: fill rate collapse — liquidity/execution issue likely

divergences.detail: broker fill ord-0008 has no model counterpart
